features.name: PQL Detector v1 (rule-based)
features.description: 15+ signal patterns for purchase intent detection. Accuracy >= 65% on synthetic data. < 2 sec latency.

features.name: Chat Widget
features.description: JS widget for embedding on client sites. Web chat support. Client branding.

features.name: Tenant + Operator + JWT + RLS
features.description: Multi-tenant IAM with JWT auth, PostgreSQL RLS policies, operator roles.

features.name: Operator Workspace
features.description: Unified inbox: queue + sidebar (Memory AI) + PQL panel + quick replies.

features.name: PQL Flag in Dialog
features.description: Operator sees fire-emoji label + explanation 'Why lead' in sidebar. Click-through to CRM card.

features.name: Memory AI (CRM Context)
features.description: Auto-load from amoCRM before operator responds: deals, contacts, history. Via amoCRM MCP.

features.name: Telegram Channel
features.description: Incoming via Telegram Business/Bot API. Unified queue with web chat.

features.name: PQL Pulse Notifications
features.description: Push/email to operator on every new hot lead (real-time).

features.name: Revenue Intelligence Report
features.description: Automatic PDF/email monthly: X leads found, Y closed, RUB Z revenue attributed.

features.name: Basic Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard: dialog count, PQL%, response time, PQL->deal conversion.

features.name: VK Max / Messenger Max MCP
features.description: Incoming via Messenger Max MCP (Cloud.ru). Russian corporate messenger.

features.name: Multi-operator
features.description: Up to 10 operators, roles: admin/operator, assignment queue.

features.name: PQL ML v1
features.description: After 1K dialogs — retrain on real data. Accuracy >= 75%.

features.name: amoCRM Auto-Update
features.description: On PQL deal close — auto-attribute in Revenue Report via amoCRM MCP.

features.name: Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Hotkeys for quick replies, status change, escalation.
